_meta.description: Historical (pre-MYR-40) transitional charge group shape. Retained for regression testing and as a reference for the REST /snapshot shape that still returns null for chargeState / timeToFull until the cross-repo Prisma DB-persistence follow-up lands. Post-MYR-40 WS vehicle_update frames no longer produce this shape — the server now emits both fields on the wire. SDK consumers MUST continue to tolerate null for both fields on /snapshot responses during the transitional window and render a neutral placeholder (not a spinner).
